statusCodes.400: We couldn't process your request. Please check your information and try again.
statusCodes.403: You don't have permission to do that. Please contact support if you think this is a mistake.
statusCodes.404: We couldn't find what you were looking for.
statusCodes.409: This action is not available right now. Please refresh and try again.
statusCodes.422: We couldn't process your request. Please check your information and try again.
statusCodes.429: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
statusCodes.402: You don't have enough credits for this action. Please upgrade your plan.
statusCodes.500: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again.
statusCodes.502: We're having trouble connecting to our payment provider. Please try again in a moment.
statusCodes.503: Our service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.

errorCodes.discount_inactive: This discount code is no longer valid.
errorCodes.discount_at_limit: This discount code has reached its usage limit.
errorCodes.discount_not_found: This discount code doesn't exist. Please check and try again.
errorCodes.subscription_not_found: We couldn't find your subscription. Please contact support.
errorCodes.subscription_environment_mismatch: Your subscription was created in a different billing environment. Please cancel your current plan and resubscribe.
errorCodes.SUBSCRIPTION_ENVIRONMENT_MISMATCH: Your subscription was created in a different billing environment. Please cancel your current plan and resubscribe.
errorCodes.CANCEL_SUBSCRIPTION_FAILED: Failed to cancel your subscription. Please try again or contact support.
errorCodes.plan_not_found: The selected plan is not available. Please choose a different plan.
errorCodes.payment_required: Payment is required to complete this action.
errorCodes.credits_exhausted: You've used all your credits. Please upgrade your plan.
errorCodes.quota_exceeded: You've reached your usage limit. Please upgrade your plan.
errorCodes.content_generation_failed: Content generation failed. Please try again.
errorCodes.post_already_published: This post has already been published to LinkedIn and can't be posted or scheduled again.
errorCodes.network_error: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
errorCodes.unknown_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
